text: T6-PRO is the modern replacement for legacy thermostat TH1110D in standard residential HVAC systems.
WALL-PLATE-A is compatible with TH1110D and T6-PRO for retrofit installations.
SMK-100 smoke detector follows UL 268 performance guidance and NFPA 72 installation constraints.
FAA and EASA commonly rely on aligned certification evidence for avionics software where DO-178C applies.
